category_sources: source_facts.description says qcli reports audiovisual metrics via libavfilter; official QCTools documentation describes audiovisual analytics for video preservation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is qcli; official BAVC QCTools release notes describe qcli as the command-line program for QCTools reports.
docs_sources: Official BAVC/QCTools GitHub Pages documentation provides getting started and how-to documentation for QCTools/qcli workflows.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/bavc/qctools, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies audiovisual metrics and libavfilter; official QCTools documentation describes video preservation analytics and reports.
